what_it_does: This file is a noticeboard breakdown item that specifies requirements for attaching images and files to comments, including mobile upload, UI-mode screenshots, image annotation, voice notes, clipboard paste, and size/format validation.
observations: YAML frontmatter identifies the item as type:block, source:claude_code, state:current, with a part_of link to board://item-11da929d
Body is organized into SPECIFIED, IMPLIED, and ADDITIONS sections
Attachments are represented as blob:// addresses referencing an existing blob store
Mobile upload sources include camera, photo library, and files
UI mode mentions a natural SCREENSHOT attachment and auto-screenshot behavior
Includes image annotation (draw/circle/point), voice notes, and paste from clipboard
Requires MIME handling, thumbnails, a mobile-friendly picker, and loud failure for size/format guards
standouts: Auto-screenshot the current UI state in UI mode and attach it
Annotate directly on an attached image (draw/circle/point)
Voice notes as attachments, referencing an external transcription
Loud failure rather than silent drop for size/format guards
concerns: 'Both modes' is used without defining what the modes are within this file
No concrete thresholds or rules for size/format guards are given
Voice-note transcription is referenced but not included
No security, privacy, or permission considerations for attachments are listed
Scope bundles many distinct features (images, files, screenshots, annotation, voice, clipboard) into one item
notes: A feature breakdown that expands a simple attachment requirement into a broad set of capture, annotation, and validation behaviors.
questions: What are the two modes referred to in 'both modes'?
What is the API or contract of the existing blob store?
Which mobile platforms and picker APIs are targeted?
What are the exact size/format limits and accepted MIME types?
Where is the referenced voice transcription located?
What is the parent item board://item-11da929d?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is a breakdown of image and file attachment behavior.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to define a comprehensive attachment subsystem for comments, moving beyond simple file upload to include contextual capture, annotation, and strict validation.
novelty: The combination of UI auto-screenshot, on-image annotation, voice-note attachments, and clipboard paste into a single comment-attachment substrate.
contribution: A structured specification node that captures attachment requirements, URI conventions (blob://), and a set of UX behaviors (annotation, auto-screenshot, voice, clipboard, loud failure) worth preserving in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A noticeboard breakdown item specifying image and file attachment capabilities for comments, including mobile upload, UI screenshots, annotation, voice notes, clipboard paste, and loud validation failures.
intention_for_embedding: To define the scope and behavior of a comment attachment feature for implementation and downstream design.
